command: echo '{"hook_event_name":"PostToolUse","session_id":"test-123","tool_name":"Bash","tool_input":{"command":"ls -la","description":"List files"}}' | bash "C:/Users/wjsswjss/.claude/scripts/auto-log.sh" 2>&1 && echo "--- auto-log OK ---" && cat "C:/Users/wjsswjss/.claude/logs/audit-$(date '+%Y-%m-%d').jsonl"
description: Re-test auto-log.sh with fixed python detection
Test git-safety allows safe git commands

command: echo "=== CLAUDE.md ===" && (test -f "$HOME/.claude/CLAUDE.md" && wc -l "$HOME/.claude/CLAUDE.md" || echo "MISSING") && echo "" && echo "=== settings.json ===" && (test -f "$HOME/.claude/settings.json" && python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('$HOME/.claude/settings.json')); hooks=d.get('hooks',{}); print(f'OK - {len(hooks)} hook types: {list(hooks.keys())}')" || echo "MISSING") && echo "" && echo "=== MEMORY ===" && (test -f "$HOME/.claude/projects/C--Users-wjsswjss/memory/MEMORY.md" && echo "MEMORY.md OK" && echo "Files:" && ls "$HOME/.claude/projects/C--Users-wjsswjss/memory/" || echo "MISSING")

echo "=== LOGS ===" && echo "INDEX.md:" && (test -f "$HOME/.claude/logs/INDEX.md" && wc -l "$HOME/.claude/logs/INDEX.md" || echo "MISSING") && echo "TEMPLATE.md:" && (test -f "$HOME/.claude/logs/TEMPLATE.md" && echo "OK" || echo "MISSING") && echo "Recent logs:" && ls "$HOME/.claude/logs/2026/05/" 2>/dev/null && echo "" && echo "Audit JSONL today:" && (test -f "$HOME/.claude/logs/audit-$(date '+%Y-%m-%d').jsonl" && wc -l "$HOME/.claude/logs/audit-$(date '+%Y-%m-%d').jsonl" || echo "NONE")

echo "=== COMMANDS ===" && ls "$HOME/.claude/commands/" 2>/dev/null || echo "MISSING" && echo "" && echo "=== SCRIPTS ===" && ls "$HOME/.claude/scripts/" 2>/dev/null || echo "NONE" && echo "" && echo "=== SKILLS ===" && (ls "$HOME/.claude/skills/" 2>/dev/null && echo "OK" || echo "NONE")
echo "=== Audit log today ===" && cat "$HOME/.claude/logs/audit-$(date '+%Y-%m-%d').jsonl" | python -c "import sys,json; [print(json.loads(l).get('description','no desc')) for l in sys.stdin]" 2>&1

echo "=== Shell RC files ===" && ls -la ~/.bashrc ~/.bash_profile ~/.profile ~/.zshrc 2>/dev/null || echo "none found" && echo "=== PowerShell Profile ===" && powershell -NoProfile -Command 'echo $PROFILE' 2>/dev/null || echo "ps not available" && echo "=== Current ANTHROPIC env ===" && env | grep -i anthropic || echo "none set"
description: Check existing shell config and current env vars

command: echo '{"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Read","tool_input":{"file_path":"/c/Users/wjsswjss/.env"}}' | python "C:/Users/wjsswjss/.claude/scripts/file_guard.py"; echo "exit: $?" && echo "---" && echo '{"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Read","tool_input":{"file_path":"/c/Users/wjsswjss/.ssh/id_rsa"}}' | python "C:/Users/wjsswjss/.claude/scripts/file_guard.py"; echo "exit: $?" && echo "---" && echo '{"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Read","tool_input":{"file_path":"/c/Users/wjsswjss/.claude/CLAUDE.md"}}' | python "C:/Users/wjsswjss/.claude/scripts/file_guard.py"; echo "exit: $?"
description: Test file_guard: block sensitive, allow normal

command: echo "=== should BLOCK ===" && for f in ".env" ".env.local" ".env.production" ".ssh/id_rsa" ".aws/credentials" "credentials.json"; do echo -n "$f: "; echo "{\"hook_event_name\":\"PreToolUse\",\"tool_name\":\"Read\",\"tool_input\":{\"file_path\":\"/c/Users/wjsswjss/$f\"}}" | python "$HOME/.claude/scripts/file_guard.py" 2>&1 || echo "BLOCKED"; done && echo "=== should ALLOW ===" && for f in ".env.example" "CLAUDE.md" ".bashrc" "package.json"; do echo -n "$f: "; echo "{\"hook_event_name\":\"PreToolUse\",\"tool_name\":\"Read\",\"tool_input\":{\"file_path\":\"/c/Users/wjsswjss/$f\"}}" | python "$HOME/.claude/scripts/file_guard.py" 2>&1 && echo "ALLOWED"; done
